hero_header: The new way to learn Crypto

clue_description: Discover the key to your success with TheClue® — the next-gen learning platform combining AI technology with expert human support. Whether you're just starting out or leveling up your trading skills, our platform empowers you with everything you need to navigate the crypto world with confidence.

clue_card4_description: Why keep the treasure to yourself? Share TheClue with friends and unlock amazing rewards. The more you share, the more you earn!

masterclass_description: The crypto world is evolving fast. With TheClue, you'll not only keep up but lead the way. This is more than just learning; it's an exhilarating adventure into the future of finance.
testimonials_section_subtitle: What other people are saying about TheClue
testimonial_jasmin: TheClue's Telegram group is a total game-changer! Being part of this community allows me to access the latest tips and insights before anyone else. The instant updates and lively discussions keep me informed and inspired, giving me an edge in my learning journey.
testimonial_alex: Joining TheClue was the best decision I ever made! The 360° learning experience offered here is truly unparalleled. From engaging workshops to hands-on projects, every aspect is designed to enhance my skills and knowledge.
testimonial_maria: The energy in the weekly Q&A sessions is absolutely contagious! Each meeting is filled with vibrant discussions and insightful questions that inspire me to dive deeper into the topics. I always leave feeling motivated and eager to learn more.
testimonial_feliz: Being part of this community has completely transformed how I approach challenges. The shared knowledge and constant encouragement push me to grow every day. It's empowering to know I'm not doing this alone.
testimonial_manuel: I've never felt so supported in an online space before. The combination of expert advice and genuine peer connection creates an environment where I feel safe to ask, explore, and grow at my own pace.
testimonial_john: The clarity and direction I get from the live sessions are unmatched. Every question is met with thoughtful answers that actually move me forward. It's like having a personal mentor right there with me.
everyone_subtitle: No matter your background or experience, TheClue empowers you to grow, connect, and succeed—your journey starts here.
everyone_secure_description: Your data is safe with us—TheClue uses top-tier encryption and security standards to protect your privacy at all times.
everyone_support_description: Round-the-clock support whenever you need it—because your journey doesn't keep office hours.
everyone_meet_title: Meet other people and build your network
everyone_meet_description: Connect with like-minded people, share your journey, and grow together in a vibrant, supportive community.
faq_a1: We offer a comprehensive, all-encompassing approach to crypto education that combines engaging videos, live interactions, and community support.
faq_a2: Absolutely! Our content is tailored for all levels, starting from the very basics.
faq_q3: How can I maximize the benefits of the referral Program?
faq_a3: Share your unique link widely - social media, friends, family. The more sign-ups you generate, the greater your rewards!
faq_q4: What if I have a question outside of the Q&A Sessions?
faq_a4: Our support team is available to help you anytime!
trainer_description: Your complete package for the entire Web3 and crypto sector. Enter our exciting future world. Learn how to invest properly and sustainably, trade and get to know new business models. With the CryptoClue Premium App, you always have your web3 companion with you.

trainer_feature_1_desc: A comprehensive platform offering everything from educational videos to news and glossaries — all in one place, accessible anytime.

trainer_feature_3_desc: Live market insights empower users to make informed trading decisions by staying updated on current crypto trends.

trainer_feature_6_desc: An integrated tool that evaluates and optimizes users' crypto portfolios to enhance performance and reduce risk.
